Our Collection

Discover exceptional horses from champion bloodlines. Each horse is carefully selected for its quality, temperament, and potential.

Premium

Nouska

$36999.00$380000.00
BreedOther
Age7 Years
Height15.8 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training LevelStarted
SireTOP SPEED KASPAR
DamDOUTSJE FAN

Description

Nouska is a lovely Friesian mare for sale, born in 2019, known for her incredibly sweet nature and golden character. She is of top speed origin  comes from the respected motherline 44 and has a full paper, representing generations of proven quality breeding. Her pedigree includes a Ster mother, Ster Preferent Crownjuwel grandmother, Ster great-grandmother, and an impressive Model great-great-grandmother, making her valuable for both breeding and riding purposes.

Nouska has already produced several offspring and has proven herself to be an excellent mother, showing calm behavior and strong maternal qualities. She is affectionate, people-oriented, and loves attention, making her a pleasure to handle and work with daily.

Under saddle, she is easy to ride, safe, and gives a reliable feeling to her rider, which makes her especially suitable for recreational riding. Her cooperative attitude and gentle temperament allow riders to feel comfortable and confident. She is also calm and trustworthy in traffic, demonstrating a steady and sensible mindset.

Nouska offers a wonderful combination of pedigree, temperament, and reliability, making her an ideal choice for anyone searching for a kind Friesian riding mare or proven broodmare.

Premium

Olivier

$33000.00$35000.00
BreedOther
Age6 Years
Height16h hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training LevelStarted
SireUnknown
DamUnknown

Description

He has a nice go in the work and is super safe. Because he is so safe he is a good match for a beginning rider. At our stables he is also ridden by children. He is super safe in traffic and is the ideal horse for recreation or a nice dressage test!

He is also very smart so groundwork is also super nice to do with him! We just started doing groundwork with him and he seems to really like it too, he remembers what you teach him right away. A really nice horse to enjoy for years! He is also super sweet and loves attention.

This Friesian stands out with its intelligence, calm temperament, and exceptional athleticism. Perfect for experienced riders and equestrian enthusiasts seeking a loyal and impressive companion.

Premium

Aukje

$45000.00$50000.00
BreedOther
Age10&nbsp; Years
Height15 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelcam and experienced&nbsp;
SireGERBEN 479
DamSJOUKE V.D. OLDE

Description

This stunning Friesian mare for sale is a 2016-born Kroon mare combining elegance, athletic ability, and an outstanding pedigree from the respected motherline 40. She represents generations of quality breeding, with a Kroon Sport mother, Ster grandmother, Model Preferent great-grandmother, and Ster Preferent great-great-grandmother, making her highly valuable for both sport and breeding.

As a foal, she earned a 3rd premium in 2019, confirming her early quality and conformation. Today, she has developed into a luxurious, long-lined mare with a beautiful head, abundant mane, and an uphill build that supports her natural athleticism. Her walk is correct and regular, while her trot shows power, suspension, and strong hindleg engagement — qualities that indicate excellent potential as a Friesian sport horse.

She is well trained under saddle and also experienced driving in single and double harness, demonstrating versatility and reliability. She learns quickly, is cooperative in training, and enjoys working with her rider. Despite her presence and quality, she maintains a calm and sensible temperament, including confidence in traffic and new environments.

At 10 years old, she is in her prime — physically mature, mentally balanced, and ready to continue developing in sport, breeding, or as a high-quality leisure partner. She is sound, healthy, and accustomed to regular work, handling, grooming, and transport.

This mare offers the rare combination of pedigree, performance, temperament, and beauty, making her an ideal choice for anyone seeking a premium Friesian dressage prospect, broodmare, or versatile riding and driving horse.

Premium

Queran

$39000.00$42000.00
BreedOther
Age5 Years
Height16.2 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelcurious&nbsp;
SireAUWERT 541
DamNAHAR FAN

Description

Queran is a talented young Friesian stallion for sale, born in 2021, combining modern type, athletic ability, and a strong pedigree from the respected motherline 191. He descends from generations of quality mares, including a Ster mother, Ster grandmother, and Ster Preferent great-grandmother. His half-sister, Barran fan it Waad, holds the prestigious Crown AAA predicate, further confirming the quality of this bloodline.

Queran is a very appealing stallion with a youthful expression, elegant build, and correct conformation. He presents the modern Friesian type with refinement, athleticism, and presence. His movement is a standout feature — he has three very good gaits with an active walk, powerful trot, and a particularly quick and engaged hindleg, showing clear potential for sport development.

Under saddle, Queran is already very pleasant to ride. He is soft in the mouth, willing to cooperate, and genuinely tries his best for the rider. His attitude toward work is positive and focused, making training enjoyable and productive. He shows natural talent for the sport and continues to develop well for his age.

In addition to riding, Queran is also trained for carriage work and performs this very well, demonstrating versatility and good mental balance. He is calm and reliable in traffic, showing a sensible temperament and confidence in different environments.

Queran represents an excellent opportunity for someone looking for a young Friesian sport prospect, combining pedigree, talent, rideability, and versatility. With his quality movement, cooperative mindset, and strong foundation, he is truly a very nice horse for the future.

Available

Nynke

$28000.00$30000.00
BreedOther
Age6 Years
Height15.3 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelcalm
SireULBE 506
DamFEMKE VAN

Description

Nynke is a lovely young Friesian mare for sale, born in 2020, with very good paperwork and a kind, people-oriented personality. She is a sweet mare who loves attention, is friendly and curious, and is easy to handle in daily care. Her cooperative attitude and calm temperament make her a pleasure to work with both on the ground and under saddle.

She is trained under saddle and also for carriage driving, and she picks up new tasks quickly and easily. Nynke shows a willing mindset and enjoys working with her rider, making her a great choice for recreational riding while also offering potential for further development under saddle.

One of her standout qualities is her exceptional character. She is not spooky, remains calm in new environments, and is very safe even in heavy traffic, demonstrating reliability and confidence that many riders seek. Because of her cool and steady personality, she is considered 100% suitable for beginner riders, while still being enjoyable for more experienced riders looking for a relaxed and dependable partner.

Nynke already has very nice, full manes for her young age, adding to her classic Friesian appearance. She especially enjoys trail and forest rides, where her calm and steady nature truly shines.

With her sweet personality, versatility, and safe character, Nynke is an ideal choice for anyone searching for a reliable Friesian riding mare, family horse, or recreational companion with future potential.

Description

This stunning Friesian horse showcases a glossy black coat and powerful physique, exuding elegance and strength. Highly sought after for its gentle temperament and versatility, the Friesian is ideal for dressage, driving, and leisure riding. Make an impression with this majestic horse, prized for both its performance and beauty.

Purebred

Sjouke

$35000.00$380000.00
BreedOther
Age5 Years
Height16 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training LevelStrong- willed
SireMARKUS 491
DamMARGUE FAN

Description

Sjouke is a breathtaking Friesian horse for sale, born in 2021, showcasing the iconic beauty, strength, and elegance that define the breed. This exceptional Friesian stallion features a deep black coat, expressive movement, and a noble presence that immediately captures attention.

Under saddle, Sjouke offers a comfortable and elastic ride with natural suspension and balance. He is intelligent, willing to work, and enjoys partnering with his rider, making him suitable for both beginner riders and more experienced equestrians seeking a talented young prospect. His natural flexibility and swing provide an outstanding foundation for dressage training and future competition potential.

With his gentle temperament, striking appearance, and athletic ability, Sjouke is an ideal choice for anyone searching for a quality Friesian dressage prospect, show horse, or reliable riding companion.

Premium Breed

Richard

$40000.00$45999.00
BreedOther
Age7 Years
Height16.3 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelexperienced
SireJOUWE 485
DamGALSKE FAN

Description

Richard is a stunning 7-year-old Friesian gelding for sale, presenting exceptional conformation, athletic ability, and proven competition experience. He is beautifully built with a refined head, long elegant neck, strong topline, and abundant mane, giving him the classic Friesian appearance combined with modern sport qualities.

Richard shows significant natural talent for dressage, supported by his excellent mentality and willingness to work. He loves training, is soft and responsive in the mouth, and learns very quickly, making him highly enjoyable to ride and develop. His cooperative attitude and intelligence allow him to progress consistently while maintaining relaxation and focus.

He has been professionally trained throughout his career and was successfully competed in 2024 and early 2025 by rider Debby de Graaf. Together they achieved notable results, qualifying and competing at the Regional Championships, the Dutch KFPS Championship, and the Final of the Winter Competition South Holland at L2 level, where they achieved an impressive 3rd place finish. These accomplishments confirm his quality, rideability, and competitive potential.

Richard combines sport talent with a very good mindset, making him suitable for a rider looking to continue in competition or further develop him in dressage. With his proven training foundation, elegant build, and excellent character, he represents a fantastic opportunity for anyone seeking a talented Friesian dressage horse with show experience.

Available

Royal H.

$48999.00$50000.00
BreedOther
Age5 Years
Height16.5 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelplayful
SireMAC MADISON
DamTHARAMA OET OALE

Description

Royal Highness is a stunning  Dutch sport horse stallion for sale, born in 2021, with AES approval and exceptional sport potential. While he has the elegant looks of a Dutch Warmblood, his temperament remains classically Friesian — cooperative, honest, and eager to work. This combination of talent, presence, and character makes him an outstanding young stallion for both sport and breeding.

He is light-footed, tall, and athletic, with a very nice, active trot and a balanced canter. He shows clear aptitude for dressage and is already impressing in competitions. In July 2025, Royal Highness competed at the Friesian Championships and reached the finals, confirming his natural ability and competitive potential.

Royal Highness comes from a very strong motherline, and his development has been closely monitored. In March 2024, he became AES approved after a video submission to the studbook, where the judges were enthusiastic about his progress and upgraded him to Licensed. Their comments highlighted his remarkable improvement compared to the last inspection.

He is a super honest, cooperative horse who loves to work, making him enjoyable for both training and handling. With his combination of elegance, athleticism, and excellent character, Royal Highness is an ideal choice for breeders, sport riders, or anyone seeking a high-potential Friesian stallion.

Breeding Information: Breeding costs are €950 without tax, making him accessible for quality Friesian breeding programs.

Premium Quality

Olke

$30999.00$33000.00
BreedOther
Age6 Years
Height16.2 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training LevelAffectionate
SireEISE 489
DamMINKE VAN

Description

Olke is a talented young Friesian stallion for sale, born in 2020, combining excellent pedigree, strong natural ability, and a calm, cooperative temperament. His talent is inherited from both his mother and father, and he has already proven himself early in life. As a foal, he received a first premium, and as a 4-year-old, he competed in the Voorrijdagen, the preparatory round before the 70-day test, demonstrating his natural aptitude for performance.

Olke is a very good mover with outstanding use of his hindlegs, plenty of shoulder freedom, and expressive front-end elevation. He has three good gaits with an exceptional canter, providing a strong foundation for sport training.

He is also an excellent horse to work with, showing a reliable, willing, and cooperative attitude. Olke has a great work effort and enjoys training, making him a pleasure for riders and handlers alike. He is accustomed to single, double, and four-in-hand carriage work, demonstrating versatility and confidence in different driving disciplines, and remains safe in traffic.

Olke’s temperament is calm and sweet; he loves attention, is easy-going, and is relaxed during grooming and handling. He shows no inappropriate interest in mares and is dependable in all situations, making him suitable for both experienced riders and careful amateur handlers seeking a talented young Friesian stallion.

Purebred

Romke

$35000.00$36000.00
BreedOther
Age5 Years
Height16.3 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelintelligent&nbsp;
SireJURRE 495
DamJANKE INA

Description

Romke is a beautiful young Friesian stallion for sale, born in 2021, with an appealing presence and natural talent for riding and driving. He has a bright head, elegant neck, abundant mane, and a correctly built frame, demonstrating the classic Friesian type with modern athletic qualities.

Romke is an exceptional mover with three good gaits, and his trot stands out for its expressive front-end elevation and natural suspension. He pays attention to his rider, responds well to cues, and shows strong, dry legwork — a combination that highlights his potential for sport and performance.

Under saddle, Romke is cooperative, willing, and talented, while in carriage work he is calm, attentive, and versatile. His friendly and honest character makes him easy to handle, while his intelligence and work ethic make training rewarding. He is already showing the qualities of a future top-level Friesian stallion with great rideability, temperament, and athletic ability.

Romke’s appealing head, lovely presence, and natural talent make him an ideal choice for riders and breeders seeking a promising young Friesian stallion with both performance potential and a cooperative, easy-going nature.

Premium Quality

Pieter

$44999.00$48000.00
BreedOther
Age7 Years
Height16.3 hh
GenderNot specified
ColorNot specified
Training Levelintelligent
SireTYMEN 503
DamGLORIA v MOOI

Description

Pieter is a striking Friesian gelding for sale, born in 2019, holding the prestigious Star predicate, which confirms his quality in conformation and movement. He stands out with his powerful presence, athletic ability, and impressive gaits, making him a promising Friesian sport horse with excellent potential for further development.

During evaluation, judges specifically commented on his remarkably good trot, noting his huge movement and expressive power. This is easy to understand when seeing him in motion — Pieter has a trot with significant impulsion, suspension, and an active, engaged hindleg. His walk and canter are also correct, balanced, and show good ground coverage, creating a well-rounded foundation for sport training.

Pieter is naturally forward, energetic, and motivated to work, which makes him especially enjoyable for an experienced rider looking for a horse with ambition and athleticism. At the same time, his calm and sensible character allows him to also be suitable for a less experienced rider who has guidance and confidence. He combines energy with a good mind, offering both performance and rideability.

With his quality movement, Star predicate, and balanced temperament, Pieter represents an excellent opportunity for someone seeking a talented Friesian dressage prospect or athletic riding partner with future potential.
